channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mamdani and AI industry exert political influence in New York, plus other key primary races to watch Tuesday.
item.description: Two AI industry factions are competing in a Democratic primary for a U.S. House seat. New York Assemblyman Alex Bores, a pro-regulation candidate...

item.title: Three money market account features savers should use now.
item.description: A money market account offers several benefits for savers in the current economic environment.

item.title: Here is how much interest a $75,000 CD account can earn now.
item.description: Interest earnings on a CD account of this size can be significant. Here is what savers should know now.

item.title: Former Oklahoma death row inmate returns to court as retrial proceeds in 1997 murder case.
